normalization factor to keep the FFS average risk score to be equal to 1.0 for the 
payment year. Due to the lag between the time CMS estimated the model data and converted it to a relative risk 
score, and the payment year, changes in the demographic composition and health conditions of the FFS cohort 
may result in an average risk score not equal to 1.0. CMS designed the normalization factor to correct for this 
situation 

• Coding intensity — CMS designed the adjustment for MA coding
